productDisplayName: AND Women Solid Grey and Black Dress
description: Composition Grey and black dress made of 100% rayon, has short raglan sleeves, a ruched cross-over V-neck and an elasticated detail on the midriff Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean preferred Hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent Flat dry Cool iron on reverse This dress is synonymous with understated glamour. Tailored to contour your curves perfectly, style this piece with high-heels and a clutch . You can also wear this with knee-high boots to balance the hemline. Model statistics The product is a size 12 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33
